questions.question: Explain the key differences between a Monolithic Architecture and a Microservices Architecture in relation to Human-Centred AI systems, referring to Chapter 6 of the textbook.
Design a Human-Centred AI system using the 2D HCAI Framework to facilitate user feedback and adaptation of a chatbot's responses, as discussed in Chapter 7 of the textbook.

Describe the importance of Implementing Explainability and Transparency mechanisms in Human-Centred AI systems, and provide an example of how this could be achieved in a real-world application, as outlined in Chapter 9 of the textbook.
